errors.accountDisabled: Your account has been disabled. Contact an administrator.
errors.accountLocked: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.submitted: If that email matches an account, a reset link is on the way.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can now sign in.

errors.tokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.tokenUsed: This reset link has already been used.
errors.passwordBreached: This password appears in a known data breach. Choose a different one.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Change your account password. Your current device stays signed in; every other active session is signed out.
changePassword.success: Password updated. Other sessions have been signed out.

errors.samePassword: Pick a different password — the new one cannot equal the current one.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

errors.tokenExpired: This invitation has expired. Ask an administrator to send a new one.
errors.tokenUsed: This invitation has already been used.

idleWarning.title: Still there?
idleWarning.description: You'll be signed out in {seconds} seconds.

denied.readOnly: Your role does not permit this action.
denied.portalMismatch: This account can't sign in here.

memberPortal.title: Member portal
memberPortal.intro: You're signed in to the SweCham member portal. The full experience is being rolled out phase by phase.
memberPortal.roadmapDescription: Your upcoming member experience by phase.

invoices.title: Invoices & receipts
invoices.description: Tax-compliant Thai invoices and payment history (F4).

events.title: Events & registration
events.description: Browse chamber events and register online (F6).

renewal.title: Online renewal
renewal.description: Renew your membership and pay with card (F5).

memberPortal.contactDescription: Until self-service lands, email us and we'll help directly.

emailChangeRevert.title: Revert email change
emailChangeRevert.cardDescription: The contact email on your SweCham account was changed. If you did not request this, click below to revert it and reset your password.
emailChangeRevert.description: Reverting will restore your previous email, sign out every active session, and require you to set a new password before signing in again.
emailChangeRevert.successMessage: Email change reverted. Complete the password reset to regain access.

errors.invalidToken: This revert link has expired or has already been used.
errors.conflict: The previous email is no longer available. Contact your chamber administrator.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds}s.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

emailVerification.title: Verify email address
emailVerification.cardDescription: Confirming your new email address — one moment.
emailVerification.successMessage: Email verified. You can now sign in.

errors.invalidToken: This verification link has expired or has already been used.
errors.notYetActive: This link is not active yet. Try again in {seconds}s.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds}s.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to see this.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to see this.
errors.readOnlyMode: The system is currently in read-only mode for maintenance.

home.subtitle: You are signed in as {role}.
home.cardDescription: F1 (auth) is the foundation. The rest of the staff workspace lands in upcoming phases.

users.title: Users
users.pageSubtitle: Manage staff and member accounts, roles, and status.
users.empty: No users yet. Invite the first one to get started.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by email or display name

disable.title: Disable this account?
disable.description: {email} will lose access immediately and all their active sessions will be signed out. You can re-enable the account later.

enable.title: Re-enable this account?
enable.description: {email} will regain access and can sign in again.

invite.title: Invite a new user
invite.description: They'll receive an email with a one-time link to set their password.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.invalid-input: Please enter a valid email and role.
errors.email-taken: That email is already on the system.
errors.member-not-found: That member record could not be found. It may belong to another tenant or have been archived.
errors.contact-already-linked: This email already has portal access for this member. Ask them to use Forgot Password if they can't sign in.
errors.email-belongs-to-other-member: This email is already a contact on another member. Each email can only be linked to one member at a time.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to invite users.

linkMember.label: Link to member company
linkMember.helpText: Link this user to a member company. Only available for the Member role.
linkMember.noMembersFound: No members found. Try a different search term.
linkMember.fetchError: Failed to load members. Please try again.
linkMember.lockedHelpText: This invite is pre-linked to the current member company.

plans.title: Membership Plans
plans.subtitle: {total} plans in {year}
plans.listDescription: Manage tier definitions, annual fees, and benefit matrices. Prior-year plans are partially locked for audit integrity.

empty.title: No plans for this year
empty.description: Create one from scratch, or clone the previous year’s catalogue.

priorYearLock.banner: Historical plan — pricing, eligibility, and benefits are locked for {year}.
priorYearLock.explanation: To change fees or benefits, clone this plan into the current year and edit the copy. Cosmetic fields (name, description, sort order) remain editable here.
priorYearLock.fieldTooltip: Locked on prior-year plans. Clone to edit.

labels.planIdHelp: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only (e.g. diamond, start-up).
labels.sortOrderHelp: Lower numbers appear first in dropdowns.

clone.title: Clone year
clone.description: Clone all {count} non-deleted plans from {sourceYear} into {targetYear}. New plans start as inactive until you review and activate them.

errors.targetYearPopulated: Target year {year} already has plans. Delete or choose another year.
errors.noPlans: Source year {year} has no plans to clone.

deactivate.title: Deactivate {planName}?
deactivate.description: Members already on this plan keep their access, but no new signups will be allowed until you reactivate it.

delete.title: Delete {planName}?
delete.description: The plan will be hidden from the default list and archived for audit. You can restore it from "Show deleted".

undelete.title: Restore {planName}?
undelete.description: The plan will return to the list as Inactive. Activate it separately if needed.

toast.overwrittenByOtherAdmin: Your edit was overwritten by {otherAdmin}. Check the latest state.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.forbidden: You don’t have permission to do that.
errors.priorYearLocked: These fields are locked on historical plans: {fields}. Clone this plan to the current year to edit them.
errors.duplicateKey: A plan with this ID already exists for {year}.
errors.memberAttached: {count} active members are on this plan. Move them to another plan before deleting.
errors.idempotencyConflict: This request was already handled with different data. Refresh and try again.
errors.targetYearPopulated: {targetYear} already has plans. Delete them first or choose a different year.

membersPreferredLocale.title: Notification language
membersPreferredLocale.description: Override the language this member receives transactional emails in (broadcast approvals, invoices, etc.). Leave on "Use chamber default" to follow the tenant default.
membersPreferredLocale.errorToast: Could not save preference. Please try again.

overrideReason.title: Reason for bypassing validation
overrideReason.description: Record why you are proceeding despite the warning. The reason is kept in the audit log.
overrideReason.noteRequired: Note is required when reason is "Other".

bundleChangeWarning.title: Plan bundle change
bundleChangeWarning.description: Changing the plan changes the bundled corporate tier for {affectedCount, plural, =0 {no} one {# member} other {# members}} on the old partnership.
bundleChangeWarning.affectedCount: {count, plural, =0 {No members affected} one {# member affected} other {# members affected}}

directory.searchPlaceholder: Search by company, contact name, or email
directory.resultsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No members} one {# member} other {# members}}
directory.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# row selected} other {# rows selected}}
directory.selectAllMatchingHint: {count} selected on this page. <loadMore>Load the next page</loadMore> to extend the selection.

zero.title: No members yet
zero.description: Add your first member to get started.

filtered.title: No members match these filters
filtered.description: Try clearing one or more filters.

error.title: Could not load members
error.description: A server error prevented loading the directory.

notFound.title: Member not found
notFound.description: The member may have been archived or the URL is incorrect.

emergencyPrimary.title: Emergency primary contact transfer
emergencyPrimary.body: Need to transfer the primary contact to a new person (e.g. the previous primary has left the company)? Click Add contact to create a secondary contact with the new person's details, then use Promote to make them the new primary. The old primary is automatically demoted.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.count: {count, plural, =0 {no invoices} one {# invoice} other {# invoices}}
invoices.empty: No invoices for this member yet.
invoices.emptyFiltered: No invoices match the current filters.

actions.disabledForManager: Managers have read-only access. Ask an administrator.

create.title: Add member
create.subtitle: Create a member company with its primary contact.

fields.notesHint: Visible to chamber staff only. Not shown to members.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.planMissing: No active plans found — create a plan first.

softDuplicate.title: Possible duplicate found
softDuplicate.description: A member with the same company name + country already exists in this directory. Proceed only if this is a distinct entity (e.g. subsidiary, franchise).

edit.title: Edit member
edit.subtitle: Update member details, plan, or primary contact.
edit.removeConfirmDescription: This will soft-delete the contact. The record is kept for audit but the contact will no longer appear in the directory.
edit.addHelpTip: Emergency primary contact transfer — use "Add contact" then "Promote to primary".

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.cannotRemovePrimary: Cannot remove the primary contact. Promote another contact first.

errors.alreadyLinked: This contact is already linked to a portal account.
errors.noEmail: Add an email to this contact before inviting.
errors.emailTaken: This email already belongs to another account.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

bulk.overCap: Maximum {max} members per batch. Split the selection.
bulk.archiveTitle: Archive {count, plural, one {# member} other {# members}}
bulk.archiveDescription: Archived members are hidden from the directory and linked portal accounts are revoked. Undelete within 90 days.
bulk.archivePhrase: Archive {count, plural, one {# member} other {# members}}
bulk.confirmArchive: Archive {count, plural, one {# member} other {# members}}
bulk.rateLimited: Too many bulk actions. Wait a few minutes and try again.

inlineEdit.countryInvalid: Country must be a 2-letter ISO code.

archive.confirmDescription: Archiving hides the member from the default directory and revokes any linked portal sessions. You can restore within 90 days.
archive.reasonHelper: Up to 500 characters. Visible to other admins in the audit log.
archive.archiveError: Could not archive. Please try again.
archive.withinWindow: {daysRemaining, plural, one {# day remaining} other {# days remaining}} in the 90-day undelete window.
archive.windowExpired: Archived {daysSinceArchive} days ago — beyond the 90-day undelete window.
archive.windowExpiredTooltip: Archived > 90 days — contact platform admin to restore.
archive.undeleteError: Could not restore. Please try again.
archive.windowExpiredToast: Archive window (90 days) has expired. Contact platform admin to restore.

undelete.confirmDescription: Restoring reactivates the member record. Linked portal users must sign in again.
undelete.error: Could not restore. Please try again.

outboxHealth.label: Email delivery issues detected
outboxHealth.permanentFailed: {count, plural, one {# email permanently failed} other {# emails permanently failed}} in the last 24 h
outboxHealth.stuckPending: {count, plural, one {# email stuck} other {# emails stuck}} in queue (cron may be down)

index.title: Settings
index.subtitle: Configure tenant-wide invoicing and renewal-reminder behaviour.

invoicing.title: Invoice settings
invoicing.description: VAT, currency, registration fee, and document defaults for invoices, receipts, and credit notes.

renewalSchedules.title: Reminder schedules
renewalSchedules.description: Cadence and channel for renewal reminders, configurable per member tier.

invoiceSettings.title: Invoice settings
invoiceSettings.subtitle: Tenant-level invoice configuration (legal identity, VAT, numbering, logo).

card.title: Invoice configuration
card.description: Changes apply to future invoices only. Already-issued invoices retain their original snapshot.
card.firstTimeDescription: No settings yet. Fill in the required fields to unlock invoice issuance.

hints.currencyCode: ISO 4217 — 3 uppercase letters (e.g. THB, USD, SEK).
hints.receiptPrefix: Only used when receipt numbering mode is "separate".
hints.autoEmail: When on, new invoices default to auto-email their PDF on issue. Can be overridden per-invoice.
hints.logo: PNG or JPEG, ≤ 1 MB, width 200-2000 px, height 100-500 px.

toast.uploaded: Logo uploaded — save settings to apply.

errors.dimensions_out_of_range: Dimensions must be 200-2000 px wide, 100-500 px tall.

errors.currencyCode: Currency code must be 3 uppercase letters (ISO 4217).
errors.vatRange: VAT must be between 0 and 30 percent.
errors.regFeeRange: Registration fee must be 0 or greater.
errors.fiscalMonth: Fiscal-year start month must be 1 through 12.
errors.validation: Please check the form — some fields need attention.
errors.forbidden: Your role cannot modify invoice settings.

new.title: Issue credit note
new.description: Issue a formal credit note (ใบลดหนี้) against this paid invoice. A new sequential tax-document number is assigned and the original invoice moves to credited or partially credited.
new.amountHelp: Enter the gross amount to credit, inclusive of VAT. VAT is split proportionally to the original invoice.
new.reasonHelp: Shown on the credit note PDF and audit trail. Required, up to 500 characters.
new.confirmCopy: Type {phrase} to confirm this irreversible action.

errors.failed: Credit note could not be issued.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

list.title: Credit notes
list.description: All credit notes issued against tax invoices. Read-only audit trail.
list.empty: Credit notes appear here after an admin issues one against a paid invoice.
list.filteredEmpty: No credit notes match the current filters.

detail.subtitle: Read-only credit-note record against the original invoice.

actions.resendAria: Email a fresh copy of credit note {number} to the member's primary contact

toast.resendSuccess: Queued — {recipient} will receive a fresh copy shortly.
toast.resendRateLimited: This credit note was resent recently. Please wait a few minutes before retrying.
toast.resendFailed: Could not queue a resend. Please try again.

siblings.heading: Other credit notes on this invoice

list.title: Invoices
list.empty: No invoices yet — create your first draft.
list.setupRequired: Finish invoice setup to start billing.
list.filteredEmpty: No invoices match the current filters.
list.creditedTooltip: {count, plural, one {# credit note} other {# credit notes}} · {amount} THB credited
list.creditedAria: {count, plural, one {# credit note} other {# credit notes}} issued against this invoice, {amount} Thai baht credited

new.title: New invoice draft
new.description: Select a member and plan. You can preview before issuing.

errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

fields.memberIdHelp: Paste the member UUID. A picker will arrive in a later polish pass.

actions.resendInvoiceAria: Email a fresh copy of invoice {number} to the member's primary contact
actions.resendReceiptAria: Email a fresh copy of receipt {number} to the member's primary contact

toast.resendSuccess: Queued — {recipient} will receive a fresh copy shortly.
toast.resendRateLimited: This document was resent recently. Please wait a few minutes before retrying.
toast.resendNoReceipt: No receipt PDF is available for this invoice (combined mode or unpaid).
toast.resendNotIssued: Invoice is still a draft — issue it first to email a copy.
toast.resendFailed: Could not queue a resend. Please try again.

voidDetails.title: Voided
voidDetails.creditNoteHint: This invoice is permanently voided. Its sequential tax-document number is retired and will not be reused. The VOID-stamped PDF above is the authoritative record; no further action is required.

issue.title: Issue invoice
issue.description: This consumes the next sequential tax-document number and cannot be undone. A void can be recorded later.
issue.irreversibleWarning: This action will allocate a Thai RD §87 sequential document number and CANNOT be reversed — to cancel the invoice you must issue a credit note (ใบลดหนี้).

errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

issue.confirmMismatch: Phrase must match "{phrase}" exactly to confirm.

deleteDraft.title: Delete this draft?
deleteDraft.description: The draft invoice and its line items will be permanently removed. No sequential tax-document number has been allocated yet, so nothing will be retired. This action is audited.

errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

pay.title: Record payment
pay.description: Mark this invoice paid. A receipt PDF will be generated and emailed to the member.

errors.invalidStatus: Only issued invoices can be paid (current status: {status}).
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

fields.dateHint: Date displayed in CE (Gregorian calendar). Must be on or after the invoice issue date and not in the future.

void.title: Void invoice
void.description: Void this issued-unpaid invoice. The sequential tax-document number is retired and cannot be reused; the PDF is re-stamped VOID; a cancellation notice is emailed to the member.
void.terminalNotice: Void is terminal. Once voided, no further actions (pay, credit, edit) are allowed. To reverse a PAID invoice, use the credit-note workflow instead.
void.reasonHelp: Shown on the voided PDF and in the audit trail. Required, up to 500 characters.
void.confirmCopy: Type the invoice number {phrase} to confirm this irreversible action.

errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

queue.title: E-Blast review queue
queue.subtitle: Review and approve broadcasts submitted by members.
queue.empty: When members submit broadcasts, they appear here for your review.

bulk.failureAll: Bulk approve failed. Try again or approve individually.

review.title: Broadcast review
review.subtitle: Inspect content + approve, reject, or cancel.
review.bodyRenderFailedTitle: Body could not be rendered safely
review.bodyRenderFailedHint: The sanitiser failed to process this broadcast. Approve is blocked — contact ops to investigate.

approveDialog.title: Approve this broadcast?
approveDialog.description: Choose to send immediately or schedule for later. Recipients receive your chamber's branding as the sender.
approveDialog.scheduleHelp: At least 5 minutes from now. Time zone: Asia/Bangkok.

rejectDialog.title: Reject this broadcast?
rejectDialog.description: Provide a reason — the member will see it verbatim in their notification email.
rejectDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this broadcast cannot proceed…

cancelDialog.title: Cancel this broadcast?
cancelDialog.description: This releases the member's reserved quota slot. Provide a reason for the audit log + member notification.

proxySubmitDialog.title: Submit on behalf of member
proxySubmitDialog.description: Compose a broadcast that will be queued for review with the proxied member's quota.

haltBanner.title: {count, plural, =1 {1 member is halted} other {# members are halted}} from broadcasting
haltBanner.body: Auto-halt triggered by complaint-rate threshold. Review and clear the halt if appropriate.

clearHaltDialog.title: Clear broadcast halt?
clearHaltDialog.body: Type the member's company name to confirm. This restores their ability to submit new broadcasts.

managerReadonlyBanner.title: Read-only mode
managerReadonlyBanner.body: Manager role: you can view the queue + broadcast details but cannot approve, reject, or cancel.

toast.clearHalted: Halt cleared. Member can submit new broadcasts.
toast.concurrentRace: Another admin acted on this broadcast first. Refreshing…

deliverySummary.heading: Delivery summary
deliverySummary.description: Per-recipient delivery events recorded from Resend.
deliverySummary.stillSending: Still sending — {received} of {expected} terminal events received.
deliverySummary.reconciledNote: Completed via 24h reconciliation (no recipient events received from Resend; resource verified present).
deliverySummary.reconcileFailedNote: Marked failed_to_dispatch at 24h reconciliation — Resend resource missing.

complaintRateBreach.bannerBody: Broadcast {broadcastSubject} from {memberName} exceeded the 5% per-broadcast complaint threshold. The member has been auto-halted from sending new broadcasts pending your review.
complaintRateBreach.ackHelp: Clearing the halt is a deliberate admin action. Investigate the broadcast content + bounces before clearing.

renewals.title: Renewal pipeline
renewals.subtitle: Active members by renewal date and tier.

table.noRowsInBucket: No members are due to renew in this window. Switch to another urgency tab to see pending renewals.
table.emailUnverifiedHint: Email unverified — recent bounces detected; system reminders are paused until the contact's email is updated and re-verified.
table.srResultCount: {count, plural, one {Showing # member in {urgency}} other {Showing # members in {urgency}}}

actions.markContactedComingSoon: Coming in a future phase — admin can manually log contact attempts

skipped.noPrimaryContact: Skipped — no primary contact email on file

toast.failedTransient: Send failed temporarily — automatic retry within 24h

error.network: Could not send — check connection and retry
error.rateLimited: Too many requests — try again in {seconds}s

banner.title: Lapsed members
banner.description: These members are past their grace period. Reactivate or archive them as you reconnect.

empty.title: No renewals due in the next 90 days
empty.description: All active members are paid up. Check back when expiry dates approach.

error.featureDisabled: The renewals workflow is not yet enabled for this chamber.
error.loadFailed: Could not load the renewal pipeline.
error.retryFailed: Retry failed — the server returned another error

schedules.title: Reminder schedules
schedules.subtitle: Set how each member tier is contacted before and after their renewal date.

empty.noPoliciesDescription: Add the first step to start sending renewal reminders for this tier.

error.saveFailed: Could not save schedule. Please retry.
error.offline: Could not reach the server — check your connection and retry.
error.invalidSteps: One or more steps are invalid. Fix highlighted fields.
error.noPolicies: No schedule policies are configured for this chamber yet. Save any tier to create the first one.

manager.readOnlyNotice: You have read-only access to renewal schedules. Ask an admin to make changes.

schedules.stepCount: {count, plural, =0 {No steps} one {1 step} other {{count} steps}}

atRisk.title: At-risk members
atRisk.f6Inactive: Event data not connected — scores reflect recent engagement signals only (max {max} points)
atRisk.featureDisabled: At-risk detection is temporarily unavailable. Contact support if this persists.
atRisk.errorLoading: Could not load at-risk members. Please refresh.

snooze.title: Snooze at-risk member
snooze.description: Hide {company} from the at-risk widget for the chosen duration. The score keeps updating in the background; the member reappears when the snooze expires.
snooze.descriptionFallback: Hide this member from the at-risk widget for the chosen duration.

outreach.title: Record outreach
outreach.description: Log how you contacted {company}. We'll pause automated renewal reminders for this member for 7 days to avoid overlap with your personal outreach.
outreach.descriptionFallback: Log how you contacted this member.

note.label: Outcome note (optional)
note.placeholder: Brief note about how the call/meeting went…

cycleDetail.title: Cycle detail
cycleDetail.subtitle: Renewal cycle {cycleId}
cycleDetail.notFoundDescription: This renewal cycle doesn't exist or you don't have access.
cycleDetail.errorDescription: Try again. If the problem persists, contact support.
cycleDetail.noLinkedInvoice: No invoice linked to this cycle yet.
cycleDetail.noInvoiceYetUpcoming: An invoice will be created when the renewal reminder is sent.
cycleDetail.pendingNoticeBody: This member's reactivation is pending review. To approve or reject, return to the renewal pipeline and use the row actions menu.
cycleDetail.lookupFailedTitle: Some related data couldn't be loaded
cycleDetail.lookupFailedBoth: We couldn't load the linked member or plan record. The cycle data shown is still accurate. Reference {requestId} when contacting support.
cycleDetail.lookupFailedMember: We couldn't load the linked member record. The cycle data shown is still accurate. Reference {requestId} when contacting support.
cycleDetail.lookupFailedPlan: We couldn't load the linked plan record. The cycle data shown is still accurate. Reference {requestId} when contacting support.
cycleDetail.noActivityDescription: Sent reminder emails and follow-up tasks will appear here once the renewal reminders begin for this cycle.

tier_upgrades.title: Tier upgrade queue
tier_upgrades.subtitle: Members eligible for an upgrade based on declared turnover or paid invoice volume.

empty_state.title: No upgrade candidates this week
empty_state.subtitle: The weekly evaluation cron found no members crossing an upgrade threshold.

error_state.title: Could not load tier-upgrade queue
error_state.subtitle: The database query failed. Please retry or contact support if the problem persists.

accept.label: Accept
accept.confirm: The upgrade will apply at the member's next renewal. The member will be notified by email and a verification task will be scheduled if the renewal is more than 180 days away.

dismiss.label: Dismiss
dismiss.confirm: The suggestion will be closed and re-suggestion suppressed for 90 days. This action cannot be undone.

escalate.label: Escalate
escalate.confirm: Draft an outreach email for this member?

tasks.title: Escalation tasks
tasks.subtitle: Manual touchpoints surfaced by the renewal schedule — phone calls, in-person meetings, and admin review tasks.
tasks.manager_read_only_notice: You're viewing this queue as a manager — only admins can mark tasks done, skip, or reassign them.
tasks.table_caption: Manual escalation tasks for the current tenant — sortable by status, assignment, and due date.
tasks.overdue_banner: {count, plural, one {# overdue task} other {# overdue tasks}}
tasks.overdue_banner_cta: Click to filter the queue to overdue tasks only
tasks.overdue_banner_clear: Filter active — click to show all open tasks again

empty_state.title: No pending tasks
empty_state.subtitle: Either no escalation steps fired today, or every task is closed. Adjust the status or assignment filter to view past tasks.

filter_active_state.title: No tasks match the current filter
filter_active_state.subtitle: Try a different status, assignment, or task-type filter, or clear the overdue toggle.

error_state.title: Could not load escalation tasks
error_state.subtitle: The database query failed. Please retry or contact support if the problem persists.

errors.task_not_open: Another admin already closed this task — refresh to see the latest state.
errors.task_not_found: This task no longer exists — refresh the list.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired — sign in again to continue.
errors.invalid_input: The submitted data is invalid. Please check the form and retry.
errors.invalid_cursor: Pagination state is stale — refresh the page.
errors.server_error: Something went wrong on our side. Please retry shortly.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please retry.
errors.offline: You appear to be offline — check your connection and retry.

errors.forbidden: Only admins can mark tasks done.

done_dialog.title: Mark task done?
done_dialog.description: Optionally capture a brief outcome note for the forensic chain. The task will transition to done and be removed from the open queue.
done_dialog.outcome_note_placeholder: What happened? Anything notable to capture?

skip_dialog.title: Skip task?
skip_dialog.description: A reason is required so the audit trail captures why this touchpoint was skipped. The task will transition to skipped and be removed from the open queue.
skip_dialog.reason_placeholder: e.g. Member unreachable; will revisit at T-30
skip_dialog.reason_required: A reason is required before you can skip this task.

reassign_dialog.title: Reassign task
reassign_dialog.description: Choose another active staff member to take ownership. The previous assignee will lose visibility under their "Mine" filter.
reassign_dialog.no_results: No staff member matches your search.
reassign_dialog.load_error: Could not load staff users. Please try again.

button.label: Issue refund
button.ariaLabel: Issue a refund for this invoice

dialog.title: Issue refund?
dialog.description: Refund all or part of this payment. The matching credit note will be issued and emailed to the member.

amount.label: Refund amount (THB)
amount.ariaDescribed: Enter the refund amount in Thai Baht. The amount will be deducted from the original payment.

typedPhrase.label: Type {phrase} to confirm a full refund
typedPhrase.help: Full refunds require typed confirmation to prevent accidental processing.
typedPhrase.mismatch: Phrase does not match. Type exactly: {phrase}

success.toast: Refund processed — credit note {number} issued and emailed to member

error.payment_not_refundable: This payment cannot be refunded in its current state.
error.refund_exceeds_remaining: Refund amount exceeds the remaining refundable balance ({remaining} THB).
error.refund_in_progress: Another refund is in progress for this payment. Please retry shortly.
error.processor_unavailable: Payment processor temporarily unavailable. Please retry.
error.f4_bridge_error: Credit-note issuance failed. Operations have been notified.
error.internal_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

refundConfirmation.subject: Refund processed for invoice {invoiceNumber}

placeholder.title: EventCreate Integration
placeholder.subtitle: Set up the Zapier-powered attendee import pipeline.
placeholder.heading: Coming soon
placeholder.body: The EventCreate integration setup wizard is rolling out shortly. Until then, please contact your administrator for help configuring the Zap.

page.title: EventCreate integration
page.subtitle: Connect Zapier so EventCreate attendee registrations import automatically.

wizard.phaseAIntro: Generate a fresh webhook secret for this chamber. You'll see the plaintext value exactly once — copy it to your password manager before continuing.
wizard.generateFailed: Could not generate a webhook secret. Try again or contact support.
wizard.generateAlreadyExists: A webhook secret already exists for this chamber. Use the rotate-secret action instead.
wizard.postRefreshResyncFailed: Your webhook secret was saved, but the page didn't refresh cleanly. Reload to view the masked secret.
wizard.connectComplete: I've set up the Zap — continue
wizard.webhookUrlAriaLabel: Webhook URL to copy into Zapier
wizard.secretAriaLabel: Masked webhook secret — last four characters visible

phaseA.copyFailed: Copy failed — select and copy manually
phaseA.warning: Store this value in a password manager now. It will not be shown again.
phaseA.savedInPasswordManager: I've saved this secret in a password manager

phaseB.title: Connect EventCreate via Zapier
phaseB.englishOnlyNotice: The Zapier web app is available in English only. The narration below is localised; the screenshots show Zapier's English interface.
phaseB.imagePlaceholderNotice: Reference screenshot — final captures pending stakeholder review. Follow the narration above.

step1.title: Step 1: Sign in to Zapier
step1.body: Open zapier.com and sign in to (or create) the Zapier account you want this Zap to run from.

step2.title: Step 2: Create a new Zap
step2.body: Click the orange Create Zap button in the top navigation bar.
step2.alt: Zapier home with the Create Zap button highlighted

step3.title: Step 3: Pick EventCreate as the trigger
step3.body: Search for EventCreate, select New Attendee Registration as the event, and connect your EventCreate account.

step4.title: Step 4: Add a Webhooks by Zapier action
step4.body: Add a new action step, choose Webhooks by Zapier → POST. Paste this webhook URL into the URL field: {webhookUrl}

step5.title: Step 5: Map the payload fields
step5.body: Map each EventCreate field to the JSON body keys (event.externalId, attendee.email, etc.). Use the field mapping reference below if you need help.

step6.title: Step 6: Add the signature header
step6.body: Under Headers, add a row for X-Chamber-Signature with the HMAC-SHA256 of the body using your webhook secret. Zapier's Crypto utility makes this easy.
step6.alt: Headers configuration showing the signature row

step7.title: Step 7: Test the Zap
step7.body: Run Zapier's built-in test — you should see a 200 OK response from Chamber-OS confirming the synthetic attendee was imported.

step8.title: Step 8: Publish
step8.body: Turn the Zap on. New EventCreate attendee registrations now flow into Chamber-OS within ~15 minutes.

test.rateLimited: Too many test events this hour. Wait and retry.
test.rateLimitedWithRetry: Too many test events this hour. Try again in {seconds}s.
test.serverError: Server error while running the test. Retry or contact support.
test.networkError: Could not reach the webhook endpoint. Check connectivity.

rotate.preDescription: A new secret will be generated. The current secret continues to verify deliveries for 24 hours so you can update Zapier without downtime.
rotate.postDescription: Old secret continues to verify until {graceActiveUntil}. Save the new secret immediately and update Zapier within 24 hours.
rotate.failed: Rotation failed — try again or contact support
rotate.rateLimited: Rotation limit reached (3/hour). Wait and retry.
rotate.rateLimitedWithRetry: Rotation limit reached. Try again in {seconds}s.

recentDeliveries.title: Recent deliveries
recentDeliveries.empty: No recent deliveries yet. Trigger a Zap or press "Send test event" to see traffic.
recentDeliveries.listSummary: {count, plural, =0 {No recent deliveries} one {# delivery shown} other {# deliveries shown}}

void.autoRefundBody: We've returned your payment because this invoice was voided. The refund will appear on your card or bank statement within 5–10 business days.
void.autoRefundContact: If you don't see the refund after 10 business days, please contact your chamber administrator with the reference below.

detail.subtitle: A credit has been issued against your invoice.

fields.subject: Subject
fields.bodyPlaceholder: Write your message — formatting is preserved.
fields.customListHelp: One email per line, up to 100 entries. Each must already be in your tenant directory.
fields.scheduleHelp: Leave blank to submit for immediate review.
fields.previewUnavailableHint: Refresh the page to retry — your draft is safe.

toast.sanitiserStripped: Some unsupported formatting was removed automatically.
toast.takingLonger: Taking longer than expected — please wait.

submitNote.cancellable: You can cancel this broadcast at any time until an admin approves it.

estimateNote.allMembers: Recipients: every active member with a primary contact email (capped at 5,000 per broadcast).
estimateNote.tier: Recipients: members on the selected tier with a primary contact email (capped at 5,000).
estimateNote.custom: Recipients: each line below is one email. Maximum 100 entries. Each must match a member or contact in your chamber.

errors.broadcast_quota_blocked: You've used all of your E-Blast quota for this year.
errors.broadcast_not_in_plan: Your membership plan does not include the E-Blast benefit.
errors.broadcast_subject_too_long: Subject must be 200 characters or fewer.

errors.broadcast_body_unsafe_html: Message body contains formatting we can't accept — please simplify.
errors.broadcast_custom_recipient_unknown: Some custom recipients are not in your directory.

errors.broadcast_member_missing_primary_contact: Your profile is missing a primary contact email.

errors.broadcast_rate_limit_exceeded: Too many submissions. Please try again later.
errors.broadcast_immutable_after_submit: This broadcast has been submitted and can no longer be edited.
errors.broadcast_not_found: We could not find that broadcast.
errors.internal_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

acknowledgement.toastAcknowledgeFailedHint: Please try again — the banner stays open until consent is recorded.

threeDSecure.title: Verifying with your bank…
threeDSecure.body: Follow the prompts from your bank in the window above. This can take up to a minute.

retry.title: Payment failed
retry.body: {reason} Please try again or choose a different payment method.

retry.reasonRateLimitedWithSeconds: Too many attempts. Please wait {seconds} seconds and try again.
retry.reasonAuth: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
retry.reasonServer: Our payment service is temporarily unavailable.
retry.reasonNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
retry.reasonIncorrectCvc: Your card's security code is incorrect.
retry.reasonProcessingError: An error occurred while processing your card. Please try again.

disabled.title: Online payment unavailable
disabled.body: Online card and PromptPay payments are not available for this invoice. Please contact the chamber administrator for bank-transfer instructions.
disabled.noContactEmail: No administrator email is configured yet. Please contact the chamber office directly.

qrExpiring.body: Your PromptPay QR will expire in 2 minutes. Refresh to get a fresh code if you need more time.

hardCap.title: Are you still here?
hardCap.body: The payment drawer has been open for 30 minutes. Click Continue to keep your payment session active, otherwise this attempt will be canceled automatically.

payment.qrExpired: QR code expired. Generate a new one to continue.

error.elementLoadFailed: We couldn't load the payment form. Refresh and try again.

page.title: Online renewal
page.subtitle: Review your membership and confirm to receive an invoice.

confirm.errorGeneric: We couldn't process your renewal. Please try again or contact support.
confirm.errorCycleNotFound: Your renewal link has expired. Please return to the portal and try again.
confirm.errorCycleNotPayable: This renewal cycle has already been processed.
confirm.errorPlanUnavailable: The selected plan is no longer available.
confirm.errorInvoiceFailed: We couldn't generate your invoice. Please try again or contact support.
confirm.errorNetwork: Connection issue. Please check your internet and try again.

planChange.label: Choose a plan
planChange.changeNotice: Switching to a different plan will lock the new price on your renewal invoice.

onboarding.heading: Welcome to your first renewal
onboarding.body: Your renewal price is locked at the rate when your reminder was sent — even if the plan changes after this point. Confirm below and we'll issue an invoice you can pay online.

success.title: Renewal complete
success.subtitle: Thank you — your membership is active.
success.processing: Your renewal is being processed. The new expiry date will appear here once payment confirmation arrives.

renewals.title: Renewal reminders
renewals.subtitle: Choose whether to receive renewal-reminder emails. Transactional emails (password resets, invoice receipts) continue regardless.
renewals.pauseDescription: We'll still keep your renewal cycle on the admin pipeline so staff can reach out if needed.
renewals.saveErrorDescription: Your previous setting has been restored. Please try again.

eventType.email_change_notification_sent_to_old_ad: Email-change notice sent to old address

broadcastApproved.subject: Your E-Blast was approved
broadcastApproved.body: Your E-Blast "{subject}" has been approved and will be sent {scheduleHint}.
broadcastApproved.footer: You'll see delivery results on your benefits page once the broadcast completes.

broadcastRejected.subject: Your E-Blast was not approved
broadcastRejected.footer: Your reserved quota slot has been released.

broadcastCancelled.subject: Your E-Blast was cancelled
broadcastCancelled.footer: Your reserved quota slot has been released.

broadcastDelivered.subject: Your E-Blast "{subject}" was delivered
broadcastDelivered.summaryIntro: Here's the delivery summary for your E-Blast:
broadcastDelivered.footer: Detailed metrics are available on your benefits page.

broadcastFailedToDispatch.subject: Your scheduled E-Blast "{subject}" did not go out
broadcastFailedToDispatch.body1: We were unable to dispatch your scheduled E-Blast for {tenantDisplayName}.
broadcastFailedToDispatch.body2: Our delivery service was unreachable for over an hour, so we stopped retrying to avoid sending the broadcast at an unexpected time.
broadcastFailedToDispatch.reassurance: Your E-Blast quota slot has NOT been consumed and remains reserved. You can re-schedule the same broadcast from the admin queue, or your chamber admin can re-trigger dispatch manually.
broadcastFailedToDispatch.footerSignOff: If you need help, please contact your chamber administrator.

broadcastFooter.receivedBecause: You are receiving this email because you are a contact at a member of {tenantDisplayName}.
broadcastFooter.unsubscribeSuffix: from these broadcasts at any time.

success.heading: Unsubscribed
success.body: You have been unsubscribed from {tenantDisplayName} marketing broadcasts. You will no longer receive E-Blasts.
success.transactional: You will continue to receive transactional emails (password resets, invoice receipts, renewal reminders) related to your account, if any.
success.contact: If you unsubscribed by mistake, please contact <email></email>.

already.heading: Already unsubscribed
already.body: Your email is already on our suppression list for {tenantDisplayName}. No further action needed.
already.contact: If you would like to receive broadcasts again, please contact <email></email>.

invalid.heading: Link is invalid
invalid.body: This unsubscribe link is invalid or expired. This can happen if the link was copied incorrectly, or if you are clicking an older email.
invalid.contact: Please contact <email></email> and we will remove your email manually.

error.heading: Temporary error
error.body: We could not record your unsubscribe right now due to a temporary system error. Your unsubscribe was NOT recorded — please try the link again in a few minutes.
error.contact: If the problem persists, please contact <email></email> and we will remove your email manually.
